Package com.dua3.utility.text

Class RtfConverter

java.lang.Object
com.dua3.utility.text.RtfConverter
All Implemented Interfaces:
Converter<ToRichText,String>, RichTextConverter<String>, RichTextConverterExt<String>
public final class RtfConverter extends Object implements RichTextConverterExt<String>
Utility class for converting between RichText and RTF.

    • get

      public static Optional<RtfConverter> get()

    • toRichText

      public RichText toRichText(String s)
      Description copied from interface: RichTextConverterExt
      Converts the given object of type T into a RichText representation.

      toRichText in interface RichTextConverterExt<String>
      Parameters:
      s - the object of type T to be converted into RichText
      Returns:
      the RichText representation of the input object

    • fromRichText

      public String fromRichText(ToRichText text)
      Description copied from interface: RichTextConverterExt
      Converts a RichText object into an instance of type T.
      Specified by:
      fromRichText in interface RichTextConverterExt<String>
      Parameters:
      text - the RichText object to be converted
      Returns:
      an object of type T created from the given RichText
